_readme: Templates use {{variable}} syntax. Available variables: {{first_name}}, {{last_name}}, {{company}}, {{title}}, {{industry}}, {{location}}, {{website}}, {{sender_name}}, {{sender_company}}, {{sender_website}}, {{calendly_url}}. Subject A/B variants are the two items in the subject array.

subject: Quick thought on {{company}}'s operations
{{first_name}} — noticed something about {{company}}
email_sequences.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I've been looking at a few {{industry}} businesses lately and noticed a pattern — companies at {{company}}'s stage often hit a wall where hiring more people feels like the only option, but the real issue is process.

Not sure if that resonates with what you're seeing, but thought it was worth a mention.

Harrison
OptimAI — optimai.com.au

reply STOP to opt out

subject: How we helped a similar {{industry}} business
{{first_name}} — a quick before/after
email_sequences.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Following up from my last email.

Recently worked with a {{industry}} business similar in size to {{company}}. They were spending ~15 hours a week on manual reporting and client onboarding. We automated both — now it takes under an hour.

Not a plug, just context for what's possible without adding headcount.

Worth a quick chat?

Harrison
OptimAI — optimai.com.au

reply STOP to opt out

subject: Still worth 15 mins?
{{first_name}} — one quick question
email_sequences.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Last one from me on this.

If there's any part of {{company}}'s operations that feels slower or more manual than it should be — I'd love 15 minutes to see if there's a quick fix.

No prep needed. Book here: {{calendly_url}}

Harrison
OptimAI — optimai.com.au

reply STOP to opt out

subject: Closing your file
Moving on (but leaving the door open)
email_sequences.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I'll stop reaching out after this — clearly the timing isn't right.

If anything changes and you want to explore what's possible with AI and automation at {{company}}, you know where to find me.

Harrison
OptimAI — optimai.com.au

reply STOP to opt out

optimai.linkedin_connect_note: Hi {{first_name}}, came across your profile — interesting work at {{company}}. Would love to connect.

linkedin_messages.body:
Hey {{first_name}}, thanks for connecting.

I work with {{industry}} businesses on AI and automation — not a pitch, just context. Happy to share what's working if it's ever useful.

Harrison

Hey {{first_name}},

Quick one — I've been looking at how {{industry}} businesses handle [process area]. Most are doing it manually when there's a much faster way.

Happy to share what we've built if that's relevant to {{company}} at all.

{{first_name}} — shared a case study recently that might be relevant.

A {{industry}} business cut their ops overhead by ~60% in 6 weeks. Happy to walk you through it on a call if you're curious.

subject: What I'd fix first (no charge)
{{first_name}} — a quick audit finding
email_sequences.body:

[SPECIFIC AUDIT FINDING — e.g. 'Your GA4 is firing duplicate purchase events, which means your ROAS data is probably wrong.' or 'Your top landing page has a Core Web Vitals issue that's likely hurting your paid traffic quality score.']

Happy to walk through how to fix it. No cost, no obligation.

Harrison
